content: The original Self-Refine framework’s single-perspective iterative feedback can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that avoids the common pitfall of getting stuck in local optima from a single starting output. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data while improving output quality for both code generation and general reasoning tasks.
